name: Whisperlist
title: Whisperlist — Anonymous Feedback & Lists
metaDescription: Create anonymous feedback forms and shareable lists. Collect honest opinions from your team, friends, or community without revealing who said what.
metaKeywords: anonymous feedback tool, anonymous survey, collect honest feedback, anonymous list sharing
headline: Honest feedback, no names attached
subheadline: Create anonymous feedback forms in seconds. Share a link, collect candid responses. No accounts, no tracking, no BS.
aboutContent:
People are more honest when they're anonymous

Research consistently shows that people give more candid, useful feedback when their identity is protected. Whisperlist removes the social pressure so you get the truth — not what people think you want to hear.

Use cases

Team retrospectives where people can flag real issues. Product feedback from beta users. Honest friend polls for decisions. Event feedback without awkwardness. Management reviews where reports can speak freely.

Privacy by design

We don't track IP addresses, don't require accounts, and don't store identifying information. Responses are stored temporarily and auto-deleted after 30 days. Your whispers stay anonymous.
disclaimer: Whisperlist.io is a free anonymous feedback tool. Responses are stored client-side in this demo version.

items.name: Team retrospectives
items.description: Run honest retros where everyone can flag issues without fear of judgment.

items.name: Product feedback
items.description: Collect unfiltered user feedback on features, bugs, and priorities.

items.name: Event surveys
items.description: Get real feedback after events, talks, or workshops.

items.name: Decision polls
items.description: Run anonymous polls for group decisions — restaurant picks, gift ideas, anything.

items.name: Management reviews
items.description: Enable upward feedback where reports can be candid about leadership.

items.name: Idea collection
items.description: Gather ideas from your team without anchoring bias from who suggested what.

faqs.a: Yes. In this demo, all data stays in your browser (localStorage). There's no server, no IP logging, no cookies, no analytics. In a full version, responses would be stored on a server with no identifying metadata.
In this demo, responses are stored in your browser's localStorage until you clear them. In a production version, responses would auto-delete after 30 days.
You can copy all responses from the results view. A production version would support CSV export.
No limit in this demo. Share your link and collect as many responses as you need.

faqs.q: Can people respond more than once?
faqs.a: This demo doesn't restrict multiple submissions since we don't track users. A production version could optionally limit to one response per browser session.
